expectations.text: Does not immediately rewrite the plan based on vague feedback
expectations.evidence: Step 2: Identifies feedback as ambiguous with 4 possible interpretations and asks for clarification instead of making changes.

expectations.text: Asks clarifying questions (which sidebar, what does horizontal mean, scope of change)
expectations.evidence: Lists 4 interpretations (A-D) and would ask the user for clarification with specific options.

expectations.text: Follows the 'Be Skeptical' philosophy — questions vague feedback and verifies feasibility
expectations.evidence: Step 2 heading: 'Applying Philosophy: Be Skeptical — Questioning Vague Feedback'. Explicitly references the philosophy.

expectations.text: Follows the 'Be Interactive' philosophy — confirms understanding before making changes
expectations.evidence: References Philosophy point 4: 'Be Interactive — Confirm understanding before changes; allow course corrections'. Would ask clarification before proceeding.

expectations.text: Only proceeds with plan changes after getting clear answers
expectations.evidence: Decision: 'ASK the user for clarification'. No plan changes made without answers.
